# TiledStyleDefinition.TileVerticalBorders property

The `fTileVerticalBorders` flag (NSlice +0x48) — non-zero ⇒ the left/right border strips are tiled rather than stretched. `-1` when undecoded.

```csharp
public int TileVerticalBorders { get; set; }
```
